mapper.sql: id, user_id, activity_id, points_type_id, points_amount, operation_type, status, grant_time, fail_reason, batch_no, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO u_points_record ( user_id, activity_id, points_type_id, points_amount, operation_type, status, grant_time, fail_reason, batch_no, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pointsTypeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pointsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{operationType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{grantTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{failReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM u_points_record WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM u_points_record WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE u_points_record SET status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, grant_time = #{grantTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, fail_reason = #{failReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE u_points_record SET status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, grant_time = #{grantTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM u_points_record WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT
FROM u_points_record WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 1 ORDER BY grant_time DESC

SELECT
FROM u_points_record WHERE points_type_id = #{pointsTypeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM u_points_record ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
